---
title: ""
---

<!-- ── About ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
::: {#about .site-section .hero-section}

:::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-photo}
![](images/photo.jpeg){.profile-photo}
:::

::: {.hero-text}
# Rosie Wood {.giorgio}

::: {.hero-role}
Research Software Engineer · Alan Turing Institute
:::

I am a Research Software/Compute Engineer and member of the Research Engineering Group (REG) and Research Computing team at the Alan Turing Institute.
I specialise in deploying software and models on GPU/HPC systems, developing open-source reproducible research software and applying computer vision and NLP to real-world research problems.

::: {.hero-links}
<a href="https://github.com/rwood-97" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-github me-1"></i>GitHub</a>
<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/rosie-w-01616715b" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-linkedin me-1"></i>LinkedIn</a>
:::
:::

::::

:::

<!-- ── Projects ────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
::: {#projects .site-section}

::: {.projects-header}
::: {.section-label}
Projects
:::
::: {.sort-controls}
<span class="toggle-label">Default</span>
<label class="toggle-switch">
  <input type="checkbox" id="sort-toggle">
  <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
</label>
<span class="toggle-label">Most Recent</span>
:::
:::

::: {#projects-list}

::: {.project-card data-year="2023" data-order="1"}
### [MapReader](https://github.com/maps-as-data/MapReader)
*2023–present*

Award-winning computer vision pipeline for large-scale analysis of historical maps.
:::

::: {.project-card data-year="2025" data-order="3"}
### [t0-1](https://github.com/rwood-97/t0-1)
*2025–2026*

A RAG system which uses small language models fine-tuned for reasoning to answer domain specific queries (focused on NHS A-Z conditions).
:::

::: {.project-card data-year="2026" data-order="4"}
### [Eden](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/eden)
*2026–present*

A RAG system which uses small reasoning models to answer domain-specific queries about gardening (focused on RHS data).
:::

::: {.project-card data-year="2025" data-order="5"}
### [multi_node_inference](https://github.com/rwood-97/multi_node_inference)
*2025*

A series of scripts for running multi-node inference with LLMs across multiple nodes on HPC using vLLM (including containerised workflows).
:::

::: {.project-card data-year="2024" data-order="2"}
### [reginald](https://github.com/alan-turing-institute/reginald)
*2024*

A slack bot/chat interface which uses open source LLMs and RAG to answer queries about Turing internal data.
:::

:::

:::

<!-- ── CV ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
::: {#cv .site-section}

::: {.section-label}
CV
:::

<!-- Add CV content here -->

:::

<!-- ── Publications ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
::: {#publications .site-section}

::: {.section-label}
Publications
:::

*Auto-generated from [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1623-1949) at build time.*

{{< include _pubs_content.qmd >}}

:::

<script>
document.getElementById('sort-toggle').addEventListener('change', function () {
  const list = document.getElementById('projects-list');
  const cards = Array.from(list.querySelectorAll('.project-card'));

  cards.sort((a, b) => this.checked
    ? Number(b.dataset.year) - Number(a.dataset.year)
    : Number(a.dataset.order) - Number(b.dataset.order)
  );

  cards.forEach(card => list.appendChild(card));
});
</script>
